response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded) and languages, with a focus on scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure. However, his lack of direct experimentation/measurement platform experience and limited involvement in high-availability, globally distributed systems (only mentioned in one role) raises concerns. His hands-on coding and leadership in AI tools and developer tooling are strong positives.
strengths: Proven expertise in scalable systems and distributed architectures (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby media handling millions of requests/sec)
Hands-on leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq)
Strong software engineering fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) demonstrated across multiple roles
concerns: Limited direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, or growth measurement systems
No explicit mention of statistical methods, experimentation quality, or bias detection in resume
Short tenure in recent roles (e.g., 1 month at re:cinq) may raise questions about stability or long-term commitment
